mod.armortemplatejson.name: Armor Template JSON
template.armortemplatejson.sample_helmet: A level 1 sample helmet that demonstrates armor attributes, effects and consumption data.
template.armortemplatejson.sample_chestp: A level 1 chestplate; sneak-use this item to open the plugin slots.
template.armortemplatejson.sample_leggin: A level 1 sample leggings item with a Mekanism-style gas quantity entry.
A level 1 sample boots item with a fluid-style quantity entry.
plugin.armortemplatejson.guard_plate.des: A defensive level 1 plugin that demonstrates item-style quantity data.
plugin.armortemplatejson.flight_core.des: A flight-oriented level 1 plugin that stores an energy quantity entry.
command.armortemplatejson.players_only: This command can only be used by a player.
